zh.Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aqu: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand於1255年出生時，他的父親Aymery VIII de Rochechouart46歲，母親Marguerite de Limoges41歲。他於1298年與Brunissende de FOIX在法國阿利艾福瓦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年享年56歲。

zh-hans.Rochechouart, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aqu: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安洛瓦爾特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand于1255年出生时，他的父亲Aymery VIII de Rochechouart46岁，母亲Marguerite de Limoges41岁。他于1298年与Brunissende de FOIX在法国阿利艾福瓦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Helie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an early medieval personal name, a derivative of heilagr ‘prosperous’. The popularity of the name greatly increased with the subsequent change in meaning of the vocabulary word to ‘blessed, holy’.

variants.name: Helje
meanings: From an early medieval personal name, a derivative of heilagr ‘prosperous’. The popularity of the name greatly increased with the subsequent change in meaning of the vocabulary word to ‘blessed, holy’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand was born in 1255, his father, Aymery VIII de Rochechouart, was 46 and his mother, Marguerite de Limoges, was 41. He married Brunissende de FOIX in 1298, in Foix, Ariège, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1311, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand est né en 1255, son père, Aymery VIII de Rochechouart, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Limoges, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Brunissende de FOIX en 1298, à Foix, Ariège, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1311, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand 1255 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aymery VIII de Rochechouart 46 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Limoges 41. Er hat 1298 in Foix, Ariège, Frankreich Brunissende de FOIX geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1311 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand è nato il nel 1255, il suo padre, Aymery VIII de Rochechouart, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Limoges, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Brunissende de FOIX nel 1298, nel Foix, Ariège, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1311, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helie De Perigord-Taleyrandが1255年に生まれた時，父Aymery VIII de Rochechouartは46歳，母Marguerite de Limogesは41歳であった。1298年にフランスアリeッジフォイックスでBrunissende de FOIXと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1311年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand(이)가 1255년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aymery VIII de Rochechouart(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Limoges(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1298년 프랑스 애리e지 포이스에서 Brunissende de FOIX(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand nasceu em 1255, seu pai, Aymery VIII de Rochechouart, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Limoges, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Brunissende de FOIX em 1298, em Foix, Ariège, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1311, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand родился в 1255 г., его отцу по имени Aymery VIII de Rochechouart было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Limoges, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Brunissende de FOIX в 1298 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1311 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand nació en 1255, su papá, Aymery VIII de Rochechouart, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Limoges, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Brunissende de FOIX en 1298, en Foix, Ariège, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1311, a la edad de 56 años.
